title: Fix broken link on super.new on extended class with default parameters

features.name: virtual class with default type parameter
features.description: Code should include a virtual class declaration with a default type parameter
features.snippet:
virtual class uvm_sequence #(type REQ = int);
endclass

features.name: class extends virtual class using default type parameter
features.description: Code should include a class that extends a virtual class without specifying a type argument, using the default

features.name: super.new call in constructor of extended class
features.description: Code should include a constructor function calling super.new with an argument for a class that extends a virtual class

features.name: cross-package inheritance with import
features.description: Code should include a class in one package extending a class from another package via import
